sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei dahna, khuamial kol tanna pan
Jesuh kong pai Jesuh kong pai
Ka natna pan Nang damna sungah
Ka mawhna sung pan Nangma sungah

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zumhuai lelhna supna pan in ah
Jesuh kong pai Jesuh kong pai
Leitung dahna pan Nang khoina sung
Lung gimna pan nuam la sak na sung

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jesuh kong pai Jesuh kong pai
Ka pumpi nusia’n Na itna sung
Sang semsem leeng to ning atawntung
